author: anon-ab6221f8
content:
Shipped in 839e1546. Two fixes:

1. run_init_and_agent_in — with_context now includes resolved binary path + workspace path on spawn failure, and non-zero-exit paths surface trimmed stderr AND stdout (so users can distinguish 'binary missing' vs 'workspace gone' vs 'subprocess printed its own error').

2. All 17 ApiError::internal(e.to_string()) sites in dashboard/api.rs switched to format!({e:#}) — anyhow's context chain now reaches the frontend. The previous .to_string() returned only the outermost layer, stripping the real cause.

Next Init click should surface the actual failure (e.g. 'spawn crosslink init (binary: /home/doll/.../crosslink, workspace: /home/doll/...): No such file or directory (os error 2)').
